categories.name: Medicine
categories.description: Medical references, guides, and encyclopedias for healthcare information and emergency preparedness.

tiers.name: Essential
tiers.description: Core medical references for first aid, medications, and emergency care. Start here.

resources.title: Medical Library
resources.description: Field and emergency medicine books and guides

resources.title: NHS Medicines A to Z
resources.description: How medicines work, dosages, side effects, and interactions

resources.title: Military Medicine
resources.description: Tactical and field medicine manuals

resources.title: CDC Health Information
resources.description: Disease prevention, travel health, and outbreak information

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.description: Comprehensive medical encyclopedia with detailed health information. Includes everything in Essential.

resources.title: MedlinePlus
resources.description: NIH's consumer health encyclopedia - diseases, conditions, drugs, supplements

tiers.name: Comprehensive
tiers.description: Professional-level medical references and textbooks. Includes everything in Standard.

resources.title: Wikipedia Medicine
resources.description: Curated medical articles from Wikipedia with images

resources.title: LibreTexts Medicine
resources.description: Open-source medical textbooks and educational content

resources.title: LibrePathology
resources.description: Pathology reference for disease identification

categories.name: Survival & Preparedness

categories.name: Software Development
categories.description: Open-source coding courses, language docs, and practical developer references that install one course at a time into the RoachNet Education lane.

tiers.name: Essential
tiers.description: Start with approachable coding courses and the language docs you will actually reach for on day one.

resources.title: freeCodeCamp: JavaScript Algorithms and Data Structures
resources.description: A compact interactive course focused on JavaScript fundamentals, algorithms, and data-structure practice.

resources.title: Corey Schafer: Python Tutorials
resources.description: A practical Python video course covering scripting, automation, and everyday development workflows.

resources.title: Python Docs
resources.description: The official Python documentation mirrored for offline reference inside RoachNet.

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.description: Add the web stack, version-control training, and container fundamentals. Includes Essential.

resources.title: React Docs
resources.description: The current React documentation set for component patterns, state, effects, and modern app structure.

resources.title: Corey Schafer: Git Tutorials
resources.description: A concise Git course focused on commits, branches, remotes, and sane day-to-day collaboration.

resources.title: Docker Docs
resources.description: Container basics, image workflows, and Compose reference for local runtime and service work.

tiers.name: Comprehensive
tiers.description: Fill out the language shelf with systems-level references and cloud-native runtime docs. Includes Standard.

resources.title: Go Docs
resources.description: Offline Go language and standard-library docs for backend tooling and systems work.

resources.title: Rust Docs
resources.description: Rust reference and library docs for lower-level tooling, performance work, and safer systems code.

resources.title: Kubernetes Docs
resources.description: A lightweight offline reference for cluster concepts, objects, and day-to-day Kubernetes operations.

categories.name: Machine Learning & Data Science
categories.description: Statistics, model-building references, and practical ML coursework mirrored into RoachNet as individual installable course apps.

tiers.name: Essential
tiers.description: Start with statistics and data-handling fundamentals before you pull the heavier model packs.

resources.title: Learning Statistics
resources.description: A concise statistics course covering probability, inference, and the math you need before model work.

resources.title: NumPy Docs
resources.description: Array computing, vectorized math, and the core Python numerical toolkit mirrored offline.

resources.title: Pandas Docs
resources.description: Dataframe workflows, cleaning, reshaping, and analysis reference for everyday ML preparation.

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.description: Layer in the practical model-tool docs most people actually use. Includes Essential.

resources.title: scikit-learn Docs
resources.description: A practical offline reference for classical machine-learning models, pipelines, metrics, and preprocessing.

resources.title: PyTorch Docs
resources.description: Offline PyTorch reference for tensors, modules, training loops, and model implementation details.

resources.title: TensorFlow Docs
resources.description: TensorFlow API docs and guides for model building, serving, and deployment reference.

tiers.name: Comprehensive
tiers.description: Pull the heavier video shelf once you want a deeper offline ML course library. Includes Standard.

resources.title: TED: Machine Learning
resources.description: A large offline video collection exploring machine learning, AI applications, and the social questions around them.

categories.name: Music Production & Audio
categories.description: Music theory, production context, and sound-focused learning packs for users building tracks, scores, and audio-heavy projects.

tiers.name: Essential
tiers.description: Start with the practical music-theory shelf before pulling the large video archives.

resources.title: Open Music Theory
resources.description: A well-structured open music-theory course covering harmony, rhythm, notation, and ear-training fundamentals.

resources.title: Dalitio Music Theory
resources.description: Compact lessons on chord construction, scales, intervals, and the theory you keep revisiting while producing.

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.description: Bring in sound-focused talks and listening material for production and audio-thinking. Includes Essential.

resources.title: TED: Sound
resources.description: Talks and lessons about acoustics, sound design, listening, and how audio changes the way we experience media.

tiers.name: Comprehensive
tiers.description: The large music shelf for deeper study, inspiration, and long-lived offline reference. Includes Standard.

resources.title: TED: Music
resources.description: A broad music-focused talk archive covering composition, performance, listening, creativity, and the craft around making records.

categories.name: IT & Infrastructure
categories.description: Linux operations, networking, web infrastructure, and security learning packs for users treating RoachNet like a portable workstation.

tiers.name: Essential
tiers.description: Start with the operating-system and shell references most people need first.

resources.title: Arch Linux Docs
resources.description: A compact offline mirror of Arch Linux docs and operational reference material.

resources.title: Alpine Linux Docs
resources.description: A lean Linux admin reference for container-first systems and lightweight hosts.

resources.title: Bash Docs
resources.description: Shell reference for command-line workflows, scripting, and quick ops work inside RoachNet.

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.description: Add web and edge-infrastructure learning once the Linux base shelf is in place. Includes Essential.

resources.title: Cloudflare Learning Center
resources.description: A practical offline edge, networking, and web-security knowledge base for infrastructure work.

resources.title: Apache HTTP Server Docs
resources.description: A lightweight offline reference for Apache HTTP Server configuration, modules, and hosting basics.

tiers.name: Comprehensive
tiers.description: Pull in the broader security shelf once you want more context around threat models and defensive ops. Includes Standard.

resources.title: TED: Cyber Security
resources.description: A security-focused talk archive covering privacy, defense, online trust, and the real-world impact of bad infrastructure decisions.
